name: nginx-multisite
description: Provisions an Nginx web server with three SSL-enabled virtual hosts, self-signed TLS certificate generation, HTTP-to-HTTPS redirects, security response headers, gzip compression, fail2ban, UFW firewall rules, SSH hardening, and kernel sysctl hardening.

name: cache
description: Configures a dual caching layer by installing and managing Memcached (via the community `memcached` cookbook) and Redis (via the `redisio` cookbook) with password authentication, a dedicated log directory, and a post-install config sanitisation workaround to strip deprecated Redis directives.

name: fastapi-tutorial
description: Performs an end-to-end deployment of a Python FastAPI application, including cloning the source from GitHub, creating a Python virtual environment, provisioning a PostgreSQL database and user, writing a `.env` file with the database DSN, and installing a systemd unit for process supervision.
